summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that CINF is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $163.56. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 35.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $167.44 and a significant trendline confluence around $167.26 (formed by 6 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
